admissions_process.summary: BIU's public graduate pages show the admission flow, document submission, and program application steps for Master's and Doctorate applicants. The recovered sources do not expose a separate detailed graduate admissions manual, so the process is summarized only at the level published officially.
steps: Review the official Master's or Doctorate requirements page for the selected field.
Submit the official admission documents listed for the relevant stage.
Use the official application forms page for graduate registration.
Follow any stage-specific guidance issued through the postgraduate guidance and regulations pages.

required_documents.summary: BIU publishes stage-specific document requirements for Master's and Doctorate applicants. The public pages do not expose a broader checklist beyond the items listed below.
items: University high license degree with university transcript
Master's specialization degree with printed and corrected copy of the thesis
notes: The Doctorate page and admissions page confirm the Master's specialization and thesis copy for Doctorate applicants.
The inspected sources do not expose additional graduate-wide document items beyond the official lists.

language_requirements.summary: No official graduate language threshold was recovered in the inspected BIU source set.
notes: The recovered Master's, Doctorate, admissions, applications, syllabus, and postgraduate guidance pages do not publish a numeric language requirement.
The source set also does not expose a university-wide graduate language policy.
No TOEFL, IELTS, or other equivalent cutoff was recovered.

tuition_model.summary: BIU publishes an annual fees page, but the captured official content did not expose a readable numeric graduate tuition table. Tuition is therefore not populated in the program records and is not inferred here.
notes: The official fees page exists, but the extracted text did not recover machine-readable graduate fee rows.
Program-level tuition remains null for all inventoried graduate programs.

application_fee.notes: The official applications and admissions pages confirm a graduate application flow, but no numeric application-fee amount was recovered.

registration_fee.notes: The official fees page exists, but no readable numeric registration fee was recovered from the captured content.

payment_methods.summary: No official graduate payment-method matrix was recovered in the inspected BIU sources.
notes: The recovered sources do not publish a university-wide graduate cash, transfer, or installment policy.

payment_plans.summary: No formal graduate payment-plan details were recovered in the inspected BIU sources.
notes: The recovered sources do not publish an installment schedule or deferred-payment table.

scholarships.summary: No official graduate scholarship listing was recovered in the inspected BIU sources.
notes: Scholarship or award amounts were not published on the recovered graduate pages.

financial_aid.summary: No official graduate financial-aid program was recovered in the inspected BIU sources.
notes: The recovered source set does not expose a graduate aid application or aid award table.

academic_calendar.summary: BIU exposes official lecture-schedule and exam-schedule pages, but the captured content did not expose detailed graduate dates or a full academic calendar table.

graduate_regulations.summary: BIU publishes postgraduate guidance and internal regulations pages that cover graduate research-plan preparation, thesis/dissertation formatting guidance, and related source-reference expectations.
items: Research-plan guidance for Master's and Doctorate students
Internal regulations page for the faculty

international_students.summary: No dedicated graduate international-student policy page was recovered in the inspected BIU sources.
notes: The recovered source set does not publish a separate graduate international-student checklist or policy.

accreditation.summary: BIU's official accomplishments page states that the faculty was recognized in 2006 to grant Master's specializations and Doctorate study in Comparative Fiqh, Usul al-Fiqh, and Islamic Studies.
notes: This is the official recognition evidence recovered in the source set.
No broader institutional accreditation statement was recovered in the inspected pages.
